input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.1
            TITLE: applicability

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.1: Applicability
T.4.1 Applicability 
This section T.4 applies only for: 
• IC vehicles using Electronic Throttle Control (ETC)   IC.4 
• EV vehicles

final_answer: rule T.4.1: Applicability T.4.1 Applicability This section T.4 applies only for: • IC vehicles using Electronic Throttle Control (ETC) IC.4 • EV vehicles
